body_transformation: The segmented body now features deep violet bands alternating with translucent ebony black, their edges dissolving into ghostly mist. Transparent wings transform into wispy, semi-transparent veils of pale silver that ripple with internal crimson mist. Antennae elongate into slender, glowing filaments of pale silver, while the white facial markings shift to faintly luminescent silver outlines. The stinger at the rear dissolves into a swirling vortex of crimson mist, its tip fading into the void.
signature_feature: Stinger vortex: crimson mist swirling within a hollow, dissolving tip.
